curation_notes: Locations derived from the patch diff (commit 0ddcd46). The patch introduces a prepareAll() helper using Sanitize::escape() and applies it to all SQL-constructing methods in object_relation.php (createRelation, createRelationAndInverse, deleteRelation, deleteRelationAndInverse, deleteObjectRelation, updateRelationPriority, updateRelationParams, updateRelation, relationExists, relationPriority, relationParams). The afterSave() method in b_e_object.php was also patched to escape relation parameters before interpolation into SQL. Only 2 non-test source files were changed. Pre-assigned class sql-injection confirmed — the patch clearly adds SQL escaping to unsanitized user inputs interpolated into raw SQL queries.
